summary: Plan-only classification for one open maintainer-ready PR. #88885 is the only hydrated candidate and should remain the canonical PR, but merge is not recommendable from this artifact because mergeability is unknown, comments and review comments were not hydrated, and no Codex /review preflight is present.

actions.reason: Keep #88885 as the canonical PR for this shard. A merge recommendation is blocked until a refreshed preflight hydrates comments/review comments, confirms mergeability, runs Codex /review, and records the required merge_preflight.
